content.zh: 此页面为镜像站测试页面，请注意分辨，若要使用镜像站请访问镜像站官网
content.en: This page is a mirror site test page. Please be sure to distinguish it. To use the mirror site, please visit the official mirror website.

label.zh: 重庆大学开源软件镜像站

content.zh: IDM、aria2 等多线程下载器不允许使用，带宽有限请自觉。
content.en: IDM, aria2 and similar tools are not allowed. Bandwidth is limited.

content.zh: 暑假期间部分镜像可能同步变慢，开学后恢复。
content.en: Some mirrors may sync slower during summer break.

content.zh: Fedora 44 镜像已经同步完成，可以正常下载使用了。
content.en: Fedora 44 mirror is fully synced and ready for download.

title.zh: 新增镜像：LXGW WenKai 字体

content.zh: 我们新增了 LXGW WenKai（霞鹜文楷）系列字体的 GitHub Release 镜像，包含 Regular、Light、Medium 等多个字重，以及 GB、TC、Screen 等变体。
content.en: We've added LXGW WenKai font series GitHub Release mirrors, including Regular, Light, Medium weights and GB, TC, Screen variants.
